marshallese.sr_imported: Kar būki organizer — kiiō kōṃṃane bwe en aṃ
marshallese.sr_reset: Kar bar kōṃṃan karōk eo ñan wāween eo ṃokta
marshallese.sculpt_engine_failed: Ejjab maroñ load sculpting engine eo.
marshallese.sculpt_failed: Sculpting eo ear jab tōprak — kajjioñ juon kōmeḷeḷe epidodo.
marshallese.assess_failed: Coach eo ear jab maroñ uwaak — bar kajjioñ.
marshallese.sr_assessed: Ḷōmṇak an coach eo epojak iuṃwin builder panel eo
marshallese.recall_needs_more: Ṃokta kobaik eḷapḷọk jān 4 ḷōmṇak ilo 2 kumi
marshallese.sr_recall_started: Recall mode: aolep ḷōmṇak ko rewōtlọk ñan tray eo. Bar likūt kajjojo ñan jikin.
marshallese.sr_recall_complete: Kwaar bar kalōk aolepen laḷ eo aṃ jān ememej!
marshallese.print_saved: Kar download one-pager — kōpeḷḷọke im print e
marshallese.import_replaces: Menin enaaj pinej composition eo aṃ kiiō.
marshallese.title: Wāween ko Anemkwōj
marshallese.tagline: Kalōk Laḷ in Wāween eo aṃ: kālet juon archetypal structure, kobrak e kōn ḷōmṇak ko aṃ, karōk ilo 3D, im jeke men eo eaorōk.
marshallese.tagline2: Ijin kwe ri-jeje eo — AI ej kwaḷọk tōl wōt, im ñe kwōj kajjitōk wōt.
marshallese.keep_content_hint: Kumi ko im ḷōmṇak ko aṃ rej pād wōt — kālet form ej ukōt wōt wāween jikin eo.
marshallese.recall_title: Recall: bar kalōk laḷ eo aṃ
marshallese.snapshot_tip: Kōjparok juon pija in laḷ 3D eo aṃ
marshallese.print_tip: Download juon one-pager emaroñ print (snapshot + ḷōmṇak ko aṃ + ḷōmṇak an coach)
marshallese.recall_tip: Ḷōmṇak ko aṃ rej wōtlọk ñan tray eo — bar likūti jān ememej
marshallese.assess_tip: Kajjitōk ippān AI coach bwe en lale aolepen composition eo aṃ
marshallese.recall_instructions: Aolep ḷōmṇak ko rewōtlọk jān jikier ñan tray eo iuṃwin. Kālet juon ḷōmṇak ilo jikin, innām kōjerbal group chips ko (ak kii [ im ]) ñan jilkinḷọk e ñan ṃweo. Ejjeḷọk men enaaj kōjparok ilo iien kukure.
marshallese.recall_complete: kwaar bar kalōk aolepen laḷ eo aṃ!
marshallese.recall_hint: Kōkḷaḷ ñan ḷōmṇak eo kar kālete
marshallese.note_placeholder: Etke ḷōmṇak in ej pād ijin?
marshallese.no_3d: Ejjab maroñ load 3D space ijin — builder panel eo aṃ ej jerbal wōt, im aolep men ko kwōj jeji rej kōjparok.
marshallese.stage_hint: Ilo jikin: iper juon ḷōmṇak ñan likūt e · iper background ñan irooḷ · scroll ñan zoom · [ im ] rej kōṃakūt ḷōmṇak eo kar kālete ikōtaan kumi ko.
